markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content review, design partner search, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Superside is out.** The agency's model—high cost, low human touch—fails to meet Smith.ai's critical need for strong, consistent brand adherence.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [**Backlinking is ending.** GrowthX is phasing out the service, which proved too labor-intensive. A final performance report is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**AI Receptionist Knowledge Base is imminent.** Final designs are due this week for the new content hub, a long-term play to build retargeting audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**RingCentral is the primary threat.** The competitor's entry into AI receptionists, backed by massive resources and a vast channel network, necessitates a stronger brand strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

## Topics

### Design Partner Search

  - [**Decision:** Superside is not a viable partner.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Their model is misaligned with Smith.ai's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [**High Cost, Low Human Touch:** The AI-driven workflow does not translate to cost savings; Maddy suspects it's a high-margin play.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [**Brand Inconsistency:** The model lacks sufficient human oversight to ensure brand adherence, a critical requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Action:** Megan will ask GrowthX's Head of Design for alternative agency referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Backlinking Strategy

  - [**Decision:** GrowthX is discontinuing backlinking services.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The service proved too labor-intensive.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Status:** The current batch of backlinks will be the last. A final performance report is pending from Joe.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### AI Receptionist Knowledge Base

  - [**Status:** Final designs are due this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Structure:** The hub will use a hub-and-spoke model (hub page → pillar pages → supporting content).](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Goal:** A long-term play to build retargeting audiences, not for immediate lead capture.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Use content engagement data to create highly targeted ad segments.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Reduces reliance on expensive third-party data providers.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Competitive Landscape & Brand Strategy

  - [**Primary Threat:** RingCentral's entry into AI receptionists.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Why:** They are a "gorilla" competitor with massive resources, domain authority, and a vast channel network (MSPs, VARs) that dwarfs Smith.ai's.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Smith.ai's Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Ad Budget Rebalance:** Shifted from a 90/10 lead gen/awareness split back to a 60-70/30-40 split after the aggressive lead-gen focus hurt performance.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Future Focus:** Explore offline channels (e.g., stadium sponsorships) in 2026 to build brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Past Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
          - [**Podcast Ads:** Too expensive to justify as a lead-gen channel; only viable for pure awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
          - [**TV Ads (Hulu/Mountain):** Limited success due to a short run and poor creative.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Target demographics like WNBA fans, who are more likely to be small business owners than the tech-heavy NBA audience.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Ask GrowthX's Head of Design for design agency referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Send final AI Receptionist Knowledge Base designs to Maddy this week.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Joe:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [Fix HIPAA statements on two websites (pending).](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [Deliver the final backlinking performance report (pending).](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Review pending content asynchronously.](https://fathom.video/share/2k_mN3fU92ssNC-9rziv2GsJ2coQx7Jf?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
